hooks.command: cd /home/user/evolucaodeexames && git status --short | grep -q '.' && { GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 git -c 'http.https://github.com.extraheader=' add -A && GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 git -c 'http.https://github.com.extraheader=' commit -m 'chore: auto-commit on session end' 2>&1; }; GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 git -c 'http.https://github.com.extraheader=' push https://grosaudegerencia-cell:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/grosaudegerencia-cell/gestaodeexames.git main 2>&1 | tail -3 || true
